title: alchemilla filicaulis var. minima
intro: Alchemilla filicaulis var. minima, also known as the dwarf lady's mantle, is a low-growing, perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the rosaceae family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating skin conditions and wounds. The health benefits of Alchemilla filicaulis var. minima include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, tinctures, or creams, which can be applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
